calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants G. Whitney Leigh and Gonzales & Leigh.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR #11918. Telephone: 415-551-0631. Email: tward@sftc.org.

Seth W. Weiner, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Richard Katzman, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants G. Whitney Leigh or Gonzales & Leigh.
Plaintiff's complaint for Leagal Malpractice, Breach of Fiduciary Duty and Breach of Contract was filed on April 27, 2016.
Substitute service on defendants G. Whitney Leigh and Gonzales & Leigh occurred on February 22, 2018, and was effectuated on March 5, 2018.
Plaintiff's complaint was personally served on defendant Lee A. Hepner on February 19, 2018.
Plaintiff filed a dismissal with prejudice as to defendant Lee A. Hepner on May 9, 2019.
Default as to defendants G. Whitney Leigh and Gonzales & Leigh was entered on July 11, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Richard Katzman, and against the defaulted defendants G. Whitney Leigh and Gonzales & Leigh, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $64,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $28,118.12.
Costs - $870.00.

Total - $92,988.12.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
